banner.welcome: Welcome back! Check out what's new in TechFlow.

overdue.title: Task overdue
overdue.body: Your task "{taskName}" in {projectName} is past its due date.

archived.title: Project archived
archived.body: {userName} archived {projectName}. You can restore it from the archive at any time if you need to access your old tasks and files and documents and settings and team member configurations.

mention.title: You were mentioned
mention.body: {user_name} mentioned you in a comment on "{taskName}".

maintenance.title: Scheduled maintenance
maintenance.body: TechFlow will be briefly unavailable on {date} from {startTime} to {endTime}.

update.title: What's new
update.body: We've made some improvements! Check out the latest updates.

welcome.title: Welcome to TechFlow
welcome.body: Get started by creating your first project and inviting your team.

loadFailed.title: Couldn't load notifications
loadFailed.body: Something went wrong loading your notifications! Please try refreshing the page.

preferences.title: Notification preferences
preferences.description: Choose which notifications you want to receive.
